response: LeBron James, at age 40, continues to dominate the court in the 2024-25 season, averaging 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists per game over 71 games played for the Lakers. His exceptional performance earned him All-Star recognition, demonstrating his remarkable longevity and skill level that few players achieve at his age. James remains a cornerstone of the Lakers franchise, contributing significantly to both offensive and defensive aspects of the team's success.
